# Diamond Dilemma manual verification file
# Tile #N = Jaap's sheet numbering. Edges: B=bottom, L=left, R=right (tile upright).
# Points 1..11 clockwise: B right->left, L bottom->top, R top->bottom.
# Point k is at fraction k/12 along the edge (corners are NOT points).
# Format: 'N: <B bits> <L bits> <R bits>'. Mark corrections by editing the line.
# WHITE lines. Source: OUR image extraction (noisy!). '!ODD' = provably
# wrong (odd endpoint count); please fix those first.

  1: 00000100000 00001000000 00100000010
  2: 00000000001 00000000000 00000100000
  3: 00000000000 00000100000 00100000000   
  4: 10000000010 00000000000 00000000000   
  5: 00000000000 00100000001 00100000010
  6: 00001000100 00000000000 00000100100   
  7: 00010000000 00000001000 00000000000
  8: 00000000000 01000000100 00010000010

  9: 00000000000 00001001000 00000000000
